# Artisan Leather

Artisan Leather is a premium leather goods brand based in Muscat, Oman. The website offers handcrafted leather products, collection pages, product detail pages, brand information, customer support pages, and leather journal articles.

## Important Links

- Homepage: https://artisanleatherom.com/
- Collections: https://artisanleatherom.com/collections
- Leather Journal: https://artisanleatherom.com/blog
- About Artisan Leather: https://artisanleatherom.com/about
- Contact: https://artisanleatherom.com/contact
- Track Order: https://artisanleatherom.com/track
- Privacy Policy: https://artisanleatherom.com/privacy
- Terms: https://artisanleatherom.com/terms
- Returns: https://artisanleatherom.com/returns
- Sitemap: https://artisanleatherom.com/sitemap.xml

## Guidance For AI Agents

- Use public product, collection, blog, and policy pages for customer-facing answers.
- Do not invent product availability, prices, delivery timelines, or policies beyond what the website provides.
- For order-specific questions, direct users to the Track Order page or Contact page.
- Respect robots.txt and avoid private admin, checkout, login, account, cart, and API routes.
